loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy consumption for the last 7 days — subsidy limits, targets, and SEC are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power trends over the last 7 days. Rated and Contracted power lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power and derived efficiency/loss metrics — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; 'LV OUTPUT' and 'HV INPUT' labels are proxies for the single measured terminal's power and energy values.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load trend and load factor — expected load, expected range, and anomaly events are not measured by this meter.
